'''ân-r-z''' ('''kanaraz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:puck|puck]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-r-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:puck|puck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-r-z
|-
! Lemma
| kanaraz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinaraz|thinaraz]] || [[word:jinaraz|jinaraz]] || [[word:shinaraz|shinaraz]] || [[word:kinaraz|kinaraz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunaraz|thuthunaraz]] || [[word:jujunaraz|jujunaraz]] || [[word:shushunaraz|shushunaraz]] || [[word:kukunaraz|kukunaraz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunaraz|thunaraz]] || [[word:junaraz|junaraz]] || [[word:shunaraz|shunaraz]] || [[word:kunaraz|kunaraz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunaraz|thunaraz]] || [[word:junaraz|junaraz]] || [[word:shunaraz|shunaraz]] || [[word:kunaraz|kunaraz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenaraz|thenaraz]] || [[word:jenaraz|jenaraz]] || [[word:shenaraz|shenaraz]] || [[word:kenaraz|kenaraz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonaraz|thothonaraz]] || [[word:jojonaraz|jojonaraz]] || [[word:shoshonaraz|shoshonaraz]] || [[word:kokonaraz|kokonaraz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonaraz|thonaraz]] || [[word:jonaraz|jonaraz]] || [[word:shonaraz|shonaraz]] || [[word:konaraz|konaraz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonaraz|thonaraz]] || [[word:jonaraz|jonaraz]] || [[word:shonaraz|shonaraz]] || [[word:konaraz|konaraz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnaraz|thĂŠnaraz]] || [[word:jĂŠnaraz|jĂŠnaraz]] || [[word:shĂŠnaraz|shĂŠnaraz]] || [[word:kĂŠnaraz|kĂŠnaraz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanaraz|thathanaraz]] || [[word:jajanaraz|jajanaraz]] || [[word:shashanaraz|shashanaraz]] || [[word:kakanaraz|kakanaraz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanaraz|thanaraz]] || [[word:janaraz|janaraz]] || [[word:shanaraz|shanaraz]] || [[word:kanaraz|kanaraz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanaraz|thanaraz]] || [[word:janaraz|janaraz]] || [[word:shanaraz|shanaraz]] || [[word:kanaraz|kanaraz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanaraz|shanaraz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanaraz|goshanaraz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanaraz|gokishanaraz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanaraznĂŒ|shanaraznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanaraznknĂŒ|goshanaraznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanaraznĂŒ|gokishanaraznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanarazshĂ«|shanarazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanaraznkshĂ«|goshanaraznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanarazshĂ«|gokishanarazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanarazro|shanarazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanaraznkro|goshanaraznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanarazro|gokishanarazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanarazmu|shanarazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanaraznkmu|goshanaraznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanarazmu|gokishanarazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanarazsher|shanarazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanaraznksher|goshanaraznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanarazsher|gokishanarazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanarazng|shanarazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanaraznkng|goshanaraznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanarazng|gokishanarazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanarazya|shanarazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanaraznkya|goshanaraznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanarazya|gokishanarazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanarazyam|shanarazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanaraznkyam|goshanaraznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanarazyam|gokishanarazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanaraznĂŒshĂ«|shanaraznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanaraznknĂŒshĂ«|goshanaraznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanaraznĂŒshĂ«|gokishanaraznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanaraznĂŒro|shanaraznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanaraznknĂŒro|goshanaraznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanaraznĂŒro|gokishanaraznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanaraznĂŒmu|shanaraznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanaraznknĂŒmu|goshanaraznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanaraznĂŒmu|gokishanaraznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanarazshĂ«nĂŒ|shanarazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanaraznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanaraznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanarazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanarazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanarazshĂ«ro|shanarazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanaraznkshĂ«ro|goshanaraznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanarazshĂ«ro|gokishanarazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanarazshĂ«mu|shanarazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanaraznkshĂ«mu|goshanaraznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanarazshĂ«mu|gokishanarazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanarazronĂŒ|shanarazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanaraznkronĂŒ|goshanaraznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanarazronĂŒ|gokishanarazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanarazroshĂ«|shanarazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanaraznkroshĂ«|goshanaraznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanarazroshĂ«|gokishanarazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanarazromu|shanarazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanaraznkromu|goshanaraznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanarazromu|gokishanarazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanarazmunĂŒ|shanarazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanaraznkmunĂŒ|goshanaraznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanarazmunĂŒ|gokishanarazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanarazmushĂ«|shanarazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanaraznkmushĂ«|goshanaraznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanarazmushĂ«|gokishanarazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanarazmuro|shanarazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanaraznkmuro|goshanaraznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanarazmuro|gokishanarazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
